name: @xgecu/webusb
description: Browser WebUSB API for programming ROMs with XGecu T48/T56 programmers.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:js
scripts.build:wasm: zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall && mkdir -p js/dist && cp zig-out/bin/xgecu_webusb.wasm js/dist/xgecu_webusb.wasm
scripts.test: pnpm run test:zig && pnpm run test:js
scripts.ci: pnpm run build:zig && pnpm run test && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run demo:typecheck && pnpm run demo:build
